content.en:
Ye Tian kept shuttling, and when he was completely far away, he landed down, covered his life breath with his secret supernatural powers, and hid in the depths of the ground.

That way, even if someone chases him again, don't try to find him.

"It's so dangerous, the Seven Star God General is too powerful, if it weren't for the Great Immortal Technique, I'm afraid I wouldn't be able to block that blow!"

Ye Tian's heart palpitated.

And that blow did cause him a lot of damage, and now he has not recovered from his injuries.

Ye Tian took a moment to recover from his injuries, and after his consciousness reached into the small universe, he examined those blood-devouring vine fragments.

He checked it, and there were 84 pieces in total, plus a core piece.

These blood-devouring vine fragments contained a lot of juice, Ye Tian extracted these juices, put them in a bottle, and then extracted the juice from the core fragments.

The core fragment juice had solidified into blood-colored crystals, a total of more than seventy crystals, each of which contained the most fundamental essence of the blood-devouring vine.

Looking at these blood-devouring vine juices and crystals, Ye Tian's body seemed to want to devour them.

Immediately, Ye Tian swallowed some of the blood-devouring vine juice in one gulp, ran the Xuanxuan Technique, and began to refine the blood-devouring vine juice.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian seemed to have turned into an oven, refining the blood in his body.

As time passed, Ye Tian's true blood concentration became higher and higher, and his aura became more and more powerful.

Swallowed mouthfuls of blood-devouring vine juice one after another, constantly refining.

Unconsciously, half a month has passed.

At this time, those blood-devouring vine juices had been completely refined by Ye Tian, and his true blood concentration had also increased to half percent, which was already a huge increase.

Then, Ye Tian began to refine the blood-devouring vine crystals.

Each crystal contained terrifying energy, making Ye Tian's true blood concentration higher and higher.

0.6 into!

0.7 into!

1 into!

1.1 into!

......

When more than seventy blood-devouring vine crystals were exhausted, Ye Tian's true blood concentration increased to one point and eighty percent, which was still far from thirty percent.

This can't be helped, after all, he doesn't get many blood-devouring vine crystals, if he obtains several blood-devouring vine core fragments, then he can increase the concentration of true blood to three.

However, the concentration of true blood at one hundred and eighty percent was also quite good, and Ye Tian was very satisfied with it.

With the increase in the concentration of true blood, Ye Tian's blood became extremely powerful, and the true blood continued to refine his body, and he was vaguely about to break the shackles again.

Moreover, the Xuanxuan Jue has signs of breaking through to the sixth layer.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to retreat and began to impact the sixth layer realm of Xuanxuan Jue.

A few years later.

With the help of some resources, coupled with a true blood concentration of one or eighty percent, Ye Tian finally broke the shackles of the Xuan Xuan Jue in one fell swoop and was promoted to the sixth level entry realm.

At the same time, Ye Tian's strength also broke the shackles and became a six-star early stage god general.

In just a few hundred years, the combat power of the god generals has been improved from the mid-five-star to the six-star early stage, and this kind of improved strength is simply amazing.

Moreover, Ye Tian had not yet begun to cultivate the Chaos Divine Power Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, if his cultivation was successful, his strength might be able to be improved to the middle stage of the six-star divine general.

"Let's go back first!"

Ye Tian was not ready to stay in the Secret Realm Great World, so he immediately returned to the exit of the Secret Realm Great World.

Not long after, Ye Tian returned to the human race, and immediately entered the Void Heaven Palace.

As soon as he entered the Void Heaven Palace, he saw Peng Yu Tianjun.

When Peng Yu Tianjun saw Ye Tian, he was immediately surprised: "Senior Brother Ye Tian, have you stepped into the six-star god general?"

"Fluke!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"The talent of the junior disciple is really strong, and he has stepped into the six-star god general in such a short time!" Peng Yu Tianjun said with a smile.

The two didn't talk for long, and Peng Yu Tianjun left.

After all, characters like Peng Yu Tianjun are usually very slow, and they are working hard to become a true ancestor, so it is naturally impossible to talk to Ye Tian more.

And Ye Tian traded a lot of the treasures he had obtained on this trip with some of the gods of the Void Heaven Temple with the Heavenly Monarch and exchanged them for the resources he wanted.

After exchanging resources, Ye Tian began his retreat in the Void Heaven Temple.

In the whole universe, this is definitely one of the safer places.

The Void Heaven Palace, the retreat room.

After Ye Tian adjusted his state, he began to cultivate the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power.

He has all the conditions for this chaotic supernatural power, and as long as he cultivates it step by step, he can cultivate it.

As for when it will be practiced, it will depend on the understanding.

And Ye Tian has a god-level extreme super comprehension talent, so it will naturally not take long to practice this chaotic divine power.

Time has passed year by year, and it has become three hundred years in the blink of an eye.

Chaos supernatural powers are indeed difficult to practice, and almost all of the gods who can practice chaotic supernatural powers are legends, and they are definitely a list of disciples of Dao Ancestors, and almost all of them have the help of Dao Ancestors, such as giving treasures to assist in practicing Chaos supernatural powers.

If you rely on yourself to practice a chaotic supernatural power, it will be too rebellious.

And Ye Tian really practiced the Chaos Divine Power Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power on this day, of course, it can only be called the prototype of the Chaos Divine Power at the moment.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't understand why the god general had cultivated the Chaos Divine Power, which could only be called the prototype of the Chaos Divine Power, but now he understood.

Once the Chaos Divine Power is practiced, it will form a Divine Power Life Scar, and the Divine Power Life Mark can only exist in the life wheel.

And only the Heavenly Mandate Heavenly Monarch has the wheel of life, which means that he is above fate, and turns his own destiny into a wheel of life, and is not bound by rules.

The gods will not have a wheel of life, and there is no way to place the life marks of the supernatural powers, so the chaotic supernatural powers that have been practiced can only be used in the same way as the great supernatural powers, and their power has been sharply reduced a lot, so they can only be called the prototype of the chaotic supernatural powers.

After cultivating the Chaos Divine Power Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Ability, Ye Tian felt that he had undergone a huge change.

Raising his strength to the middle of the six-star stage was only secondary, and the most important thing was that his Great Dao realm had undergone a substantial transformation.

"My Great Dao realm is already the Origin Perfection, and the next step is to condense the prototype of the Great Dao, could it be that I can condense the prototype of the Great Dao now?" Ye Tian said in surprise.

He closed his eyes and took a closer look.

Soon, he came to his senses.

"Defense Avenue, Flesh Avenue!"

He actually felt the true meaning of these two avenues, and it seemed that he could already condense these two avenues.

There are thousands of avenues, not the twelve attribute avenues of the Chaos Avenue cultivated by Ye Tian, just take the avenue of fire as an example, everyone's avenue of fire is different.

For example, the Avenue of Fire, the Avenue of Explosion, the Avenue of Fire Phoenix......

As for the Great Dao of Defense and the Great Dao of the Flesh, Ye Tian had not studied much before, and his major had always been the Great Dao of the Twelve Attributes, which was also the Great Dao of the Fundamentals.

"The Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power has something to do with the Great Dao of Defense and the Great Dao of the Flesh Body, could it be that if you practice a Chaos Divine Power, you can condense the prototype of the corresponding Great Dao?" Ye Tian guessed.

If this is the case, he only needs to collect the corresponding Chaos Divine Power and practice it into a Sect Divine Power, and he can condense the corresponding Great Dao Prototype.

The Chaos Avenue Prototype is the strongest Great Avenue Prototype, which is composed of twelve kinds of Great Avenues.

If the prototype of the Chaos Avenue was condensed all at once, Ye Tian would not be able to do it, but he could condense it through one door and finally condense into the prototype of the Chaos Dao.

"The Great Dao of Defense and the Great Dao of the Flesh cannot be condensed for the time being, otherwise I will be dominated by the Great Dao of Defense and the Great Dao of the Flesh, and the foundation is extremely important. I am the foundation forged by the Chaos Dao, and I can't transform the Dao now, and half of the foundation I forged before will be abolished!"

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian gave up the prototype of the Condensation Defense Dao and the prototype of the Flesh Dao.

"The Avenue of Time and Space is the strongest avenue, and it is naturally the best to condense the foundation of the Avenue with the Avenue of Time and the Avenue of Space, and then slowly increase the prototype of the other avenues with the prototype of the Avenue of Time and Space. But the space-time chaos supernatural power is too rare, and the auxiliary materials needed are estimated to be extremely rare, and I can't get it now, unless I ......"

Ye Tian thought of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

If he became a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, would it be possible to obtain the space-time chaos supernatural power and the relative space-time innate origin thing?
